summary.headline: Bunge reports first quarter 2024 results with lower earnings compared to prior year.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Global SA reported Q1 2024 financial results, showing a decline in GAAP diluted EPS from $4.15 to $1.68 and adjusted EPS from $3.26 to $3.04. The company highlighted progress on Viterra integration planning.

segment_commentary.narrative_summary: Lower results in Processing were partially offset by higher results in Europe and Asia crush value chains. Merchandising saw lower results due to global grains and oils value chains.
Higher results in Europe were offset by lower results in North America and Asia.
Higher results driven by South America, reflecting improved margins and a more favorable origination market environment.

corporate_and_other.narrative_summary: Corporate expenses decreased due to timing of performance-based compensation. Other segment saw higher results related to Bunge Ventures and captive insurance program.

non_core_segments.narrative_summary: Improved performance driven by higher sugar volumes and prices, offsetting lower ethanol prices.
